tools.name: accessTokens.deleteV2AccessTokensUuid
tools.description: Deletes a personal access token permanently. This cannot be undone.

tools.name: accessTokens.getV2AccessTokens
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of personal access tokens.

tools.name: accessTokens.getV2AccessTokensUuid
tools.description: Returns a personal access token by UUID.

tools.name: accessTokens.patchV2AccessTokensUuid
tools.description:
Updates a personal access token partially. You can either update the
token's label or enable/disable it.

tools.name: accessTokens.postV2AccessTokens
tools.description: Creates and returns a personal access token.

tools.name: auditLogs.auditLogsGetAuditActions
tools.description: Get audit log actions for a namespace to be used as a filter for querying audit events.

tools.name: auditLogs.auditLogsGetAuditLogs
tools.description: Get audit log events for a given namespace.

tools.name: authentication.postUsers2FaLogin
tools.description:
When user has 2FA enabled, this is the second call to perform after
`/v2/users/login` call.

Creates and returns a bearer token in JWT format that you can use to authenticate with Docker Hub APIs.

The returned token is used in the HTTP Authorization header like `Authorization: Bearer {TOKEN}`.

Most Docker Hub APIs require this token either to consume or to get detailed information. For example, to list images in a private repository.

tools.name: authentication.postUsersLogin
tools.description:
Creates and returns a bearer token in JWT format that you can use to
authenticate with Docker Hub APIs.

The returned token is used in the HTTP Authorization header like `Authorization: Bearer {TOKEN}`.

Most Docker Hub APIs require this token either to consume or to get detailed information. For example, to list images in a private repository.

tools.name: images.getNamespacesRepositoriesImages
tools.description: Gets details on the images in a repository.

tools.name: images.getNamespacesRepositoriesImagesSummary
tools.description:
Gets the number of images in a repository and the number of images
counted as active and inactive.

tools.name: images.getNamespacesRepositoriesImagesTags
tools.description: Gets current and historical tags for an image.

tools.name: images.postNamespacesDeleteImages
tools.description:
Deletes one or more images within a namespace. This is currently limited to a single 
repository.

If you attempt to delete images that are marked as active or are currently tagged, the deletion does not happen and it displays the warnings.
To continue with the deletion, you must ignore these warnings by putting them in the `ignore_warnings` property.

Deleting a currently tagged image deletes the tag from the repository.

You cannot ignore errors. It is not possible to directly delete children of multi-arch images.

tools.name: orgSettings.getV2OrgsNameSettings
tools.description: Returns organization settings by name.

tools.name: orgSettings.putV2OrgsNameSettings
tools.description:
Updates an organization's settings. Some settings are only used when the
organization is on a business plan.

***Only users in the "owners" group of the organization can use this endpoint.***

The following settings are only used on a business plan:
- `restricted_images`

tools.name: repositories.getV2NamespacesNamespaceRepositoriesRepositoryTags
tools.description: List repository tags

tools.name: repositories.getV2NamespacesNamespaceRepositoriesRepositoryTagsTag
tools.description: Read repository tag

tools.name: repositories.headV2NamespacesNamespaceRepositoriesRepositoryTags
tools.description: Check repository tags

tools.name: repositories.headV2NamespacesNamespaceRepositoriesRepositoryTagsTag
tools.description: Check repository tag

tools.name: scim.getV2Scim20ResourceTypes
tools.description: Returns all resource types supported for the SCIM configuration.

tools.name: scim.getV2Scim20ResourceTypesName
tools.description: Returns a resource type by name.

tools.name: scim.getV2Scim20Schemas
tools.description: Returns all schemas supported for the SCIM configuration.

tools.name: scim.getV2Scim20SchemasId
tools.description: Returns a schema by ID.

tools.name: scim.getV2Scim20ServiceProviderConfig
tools.description: Returns a service provider config for Docker's configuration.

tools.name: scim.getV2Scim20Users
tools.description:
List users, returns paginated users for an organization. Use `startIndex` and `count` query parameters to receive paginated results. **Sorting:**
Sorting lets you to specify the order of returned resources by specifying a combination of `sortBy` and `sortOrder` query parameters. The `sortBy` parameter specifies the attribute whose value will be used to order the returned responses. The `sortOrder` parameter defines the order in which the `sortBy` parameter is applied. Allowed values are "ascending" and "descending". **Filtering:**
You can request a subset of resources by specifying the `filter` query parameter containing a filter expression. Attribute names and attribute operators used in filters are case insensitive. The filter parameter must contain at least one valid expression. Each expression must contain an attribute name followed by an attribute operator and an optional value. Supported operators are listed below. - `eq` equal - `ne` not equal - `co` contains - `sw` starts with - `and` Logical "and" - `or` Logical "or" - `not` "Not" function - `()` Precedence grouping

tools.name: scim.getV2Scim20UsersId
tools.description: Returns a user by ID.

tools.name: scim.postV2Scim20Users
tools.description:
Creates a user. If the user already exists by email, they are assigned
to the organization on the "company" team.

tools.name: scim.putV2Scim20UsersId
tools.description:
Updates a user. Use this route to change the user's name, activate,
and deactivate the user.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
